find.match_belief: A frame is static. Thousands of frames at sixty hertz become alive. That's the craft.

profile.major: Arts, Technology & the Business of Innovation
profile.belief: Building is thinking out loud. Code and play are the only honest conversation between intention and truth.
profile.working_on: simulation where you navigate your family's failing bookstore across three generations of choice and consequence

hidden_prompt: Somewhere in this room is the person behind "Animating character fear through micro-gestures—eye flickers, breath catches—so subtle audiences feel it before they know they're watching." Go find them.
magic_inference: You are driven by a desire to explore the intricate tapestry of familial legacy, revealing how choices shape identity and connection.
